stemHtml: A multi-engined performance class B aeroplane has a wingspan of more than 60 metres. What is the semi-width of the obstacle accountability area at a distance of D from the end of the TOD? A semi-width…

options.a: Of at least 2 x wingspan plus 90 m plus D x 0.125.
options.b: Of at least 90 m plus D x 0.125.
options.c: Of at least 1/2 x wingspan plus 60 m plus D x 0.125.
options.d: At the discretion of the pilot to ensure obstacle avoidance.
